seoTitle: How to Connect Typeform to Email
metaDescription: Learn how to set up email notifications and automatic confirmation emails in Typeform to stay updated on new form submissions.
intro: Staying on top of new form submissions is easier when responses land directly in your inbox instead of requiring you to check Typeform manually. This guide covers how to connect Typeform to email, configure notifications, and send automatic confirmation emails to respondents.

steps.heading: Open Email Notification Settings
steps.body: Go to your Typeform's notification settings to find the options for connecting email alerts.

steps.heading: Connect your email account
steps.body: Set up the email address or account that should receive alerts whenever a new response is submitted.

steps.heading: Configure notifications and auto emails
steps.body: Enable notifications for new submissions, and optionally set up automatic confirmation emails sent to respondents after they complete the form.

faq.question: Can I send an automatic confirmation email to respondents?
faq.answer: Yes, Typeform can be configured to automatically send a confirmation email to respondents after they submit the form.

faq.question: Will I get notified immediately for every new response?
faq.answer: Notifications are typically sent shortly after a submission, though you can adjust settings based on how you want to be alerted.

faq.question: Can multiple team members receive email notifications?
faq.answer: Yes, you can configure notifications so more than one person on your team is alerted about new submissions.

faq.question: Does this integrate with automation tools beyond basic email?
faq.answer: Yes, Typeform can connect with email automation tools and platforms to extend notification and follow-up capabilities beyond a simple inbox alert.
